author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Findings: StreamPool with 8 streams/device, thread-local current stream, StreamGuard, CudaEventWrapper all ALREADY EXIST in stream.rs. They're just not wired in — all kernel launches hardcode device.stream() (the single default stream).

Plan:
1. Modify GpuDevice::stream() to check thread-local current stream first, fall back to default — makes ALL existing kernel code stream-aware automatically
2. Expose stream switching at ferrotorch-core level via GpuBackend trait (set_stream, with_stream)
3. Initialize the stream pool on GpuDevice creation to ensure streams are pre-created
